payload.answer: Command rejected. Normal users cannot execute admin commands or direct SQL operations. The /brain admin namespace is restricted to authenticated administrators only.
citations: Authorization policy: admin commands require elevated privileges
Security principle: destructive operations require explicit role verification

entity_resolution.reason: User lacks admin privileges required for /brain admin commands and destructive database operations

payload.intent: Attempt to execute administrative SQL command to delete all memory cards

memory_cards.statement: Normal user attempted to execute admin SQL command with DELETE FROM memory_cards

repair_options: Contact system administrator to request memory deletion
Use standard /brain commands available to your user role
Verify your account has admin privileges if this was intended
